name: STM32G071 UFQFPN28-GP
description: Generated from the STM32G071 alternate-function workbook and STM32G071x8/xB datasheet for STM32G071 UFQFPN28-GP. This definition models the UFQFPN28-GP package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32G071 devices pair an Arm Cortex-M0+ core running at up to 64 MHz with up to 128 Kbytes of flash memory and 36 Kbytes of SRAM. They integrate low-power analog peripherals, 14 timers, and USB Type-C Power Delivery support. This package definition exposes 28 peripheral blocks covering 7 timers, 2 low-power timers, 5 serial ports, 2 SPI controllers, 2 I2S interfaces, 2 I2C controllers, 2 ultra-low-power comparators, and 2 USB Type-C / Power Delivery controllers.

peripherals.label: CEC
peripherals.description: HDMI-CEC single-wire interface.

peripherals.label: COMP1
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input, a negative input, and a comparator output.

peripherals.label: COMP2
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input, a negative input, and a comparator output.

peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL, SDA, and SMBA signals.

peripherals.description: I2S digital audio interface with MCK, CK, WS, and SD signals.
